title: Quantum Algorithms coursework (Qiskit, VQE)
context: Completed a Master's-level Quantum Algorithms module covering foundational algorithms and variational methods.
details: Studied Deutsch–Jozsa, Grover, Shor, and the variational quantum eigensolver (VQE). Implemented small Qiskit circuits for the textbook examples as part of the graded exercises.
outcome: Top grade in the Quantum Algorithms module.

title: Variational quantum eigensolver exercise
context: Implemented a small VQE-style circuit in Qiskit for a 2-qubit Hamiltonian as part of the Quantum Algorithms coursework.
details: Used a parameterized ansatz, ran the circuit on a simulator backend, and computed the expectation value. Compared to the analytical ground-state energy of the chosen Hamiltonian.
outcome: Recovered the analytical ground-state energy to within 1% on the 2-qubit test case.
